summary: The first goal-driven, proactive AI team for e-commerce Discussion | Link
content: ClawTeams is an AI employee platform for e-commerce sellers. Instead of hiring specialists—or doing everything yourself—you get a coordinated AI team that thinks, plans, and executes like real employees. One goal. One team. Zero micromanagement. Tell your team lead what you want—"Increase Q4 revenue by 20%"—and they break it down, assign specialists, and run the plan. You get updates in Slack or Discord. High-stakes decisions wait for your approval. Everything else just happens.
chineseSummary: 第一个目标驱动、积极主动的电子商务人工智能团队 讨论 |关联
chineseContent: ClawTeams是一个面向电商卖家的人工智能员工平台。您无需聘请专家或自己做所有事情，而是拥有一支协调一致的人工智能团队，可以像真正的员工一样思考、计划和执行。一球。一队。零微观管理。告诉你的团队领导你想要什么——“将第四季度的收入增加 20%”——然后他们会分解它、指派专家并运行该计划。您可以在 Slack 或 Discord 中获取更新。高风险的决定等待您的批准。其他一切都会发生。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
